suggestions: I've always had a passion for programming and I'm looking for a good developer to show me how to handle a project with a high degree of discipline.
In this episode of the show we're talking about our experience with creating a simple and simple project with a small team.
If you're interested in an advanced programming language or toolkit, I would love to hear it. How can I give you a link?
If you're interested in coding or programming in general, I'd love to hear more about it.
So what do you think of the interview process? Have you had any thoughts on the process? Would you like to see a video of it?
